def calculate_discount(price: float, user_type: str) -> float:
    if user_type == "premium":
        return price * 0.8
    elif user_type == "gold":
        return price * 0.7
    elif user_type == "vip":
        return price * 0.6
    else:
        return price


def get_priority_label(priority: int) -> str:
    if priority == 1:
        return "critical"
    elif priority == 2:
        return "high"
    elif priority == 3:
        return "medium"
    elif priority == 4:
        return "low"
    else:
        return "unknown"


def classify_response(status_code: int) -> str:
    if status_code == 200:
        return "success"
    elif status_code == 404:
        return "not_found"
    elif status_code == 500:
        return "server_error"
    elif status_code == 403:
        return "forbidden"
    else:
        return "other"
